title: Admin Assistant
description:
Key Responsibilities

1.      Operations & Project Support

  • Provide administrative support to Operations and Project teams.
  • Assist in preparation and maintenance of project documentation (daily reports, progress records, method statements, permits, etc.).
  • Coordinate internal communications between site teams, operations, and office.
  • Track project schedules, manpower deployment, and site submissions as assigned.

2.      Machinery & Equipment Administration

  • Maintain records of company machinery and equipment (deployment, servicing, inspection, certification, and breakdown logs).
  • Assist in scheduling machinery servicing, inspection, and statutory certifications.
  • Track machinery usage, movement between sites, and downtime.
  • Support documentation for machinery rental, hire, and return records (if applicable).

3.      Documentation & Filing

  • Maintain proper filing (physical and digital) of contracts, purchase orders, delivery orders, invoices, and machinery documents.
  • Ensure documents are updated, accurate, and readily accessible for audits or management review.
  • Assist in preparation of reports and summaries for management when required.

4.      Coordination & General Administration

  • Liaise with suppliers, subcontractors, and internal departments for operational matters.
  • Support procurement documentation (PO tracking, delivery coordination, DO verification).
  • Handle general administrative duties such as data entry, filing, and meeting coordination.
  • Perform other ad-hoc administrative tasks as assigned by management.

Requirements

Education & Experience

  • Diploma or equivalent qualification in Business Administration, Operations, or related field.
  • 1–3 years of administrative experience, preferably in construction, engineering, or machinery-related environment.
  • Able to use Chinese & English to liaise with operators/stakeholders

Skills & Competencies

  • Good organizational and coordination skills.
  • Detail-oriented with strong documentation control ability.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook).
  • Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced, environment.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills.

postedCompany.description:
FUCHI PTE. LTD.


We are one of the leading Specialist Contractor in Temporary Earth Retaining Stabilizing Structures (such as sheet piling, strutting and decking) works in Singapore.  Awarded with the highly acclaimed BizSafe Star award and S1 level steel specialist, we have a steady track record of public projects with a large potential for growth. Join us today for a fulfilling career in construction industry (topped with work life balance)!
